overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dark cyberpunk alley with neon signs, transitioning through a pink-lit corridor, and entering a large multi-level nightclub called 'Moxie's' filled with NPCs and vibrant neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark narrow alley past a Speed Loan storefront with cyan neon lighting

entered.detail: storefront with large digital advertisement for Speed Loan and cyan neon trim
corrugated metal security shutter with horizontal pink neon light above
bright cyan neon signage reading SPEED on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark narrow alleyway with a prominent Speed Loan storefront illuminated by cyan neon lights on the right. A person with distinctive blue hair and a neon pink vest stands against a metal shutter wall on the left as the camera walks forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: long industrial corridor with intense pink neon wall lighting

events.description: turns corner from alley into long corridor with intense pink neon lighting on right wall

agents.ego_description: proceeding down a long straight corridor with pink neon lights illuminating the path

notable_agents.action: two people standing together against the neon-lit wall on the right

entered.detail: vertical strips of intense magenta pink neon lights with decorative patterns running along the right wall
illuminated advertisement posters mounted on the left wall showing various characters
exposed industrial ventilation pipes and ductwork on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a long industrial corridor bathed in intense pink neon light from vertical strips on the right wall. Two NPCs stand against the illuminated wall while the player walks toward the distant end of the passage, with exposed pipes visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level cyberpunk nightclub with central bar and upper balconies

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large open nightclub space with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: entering the club and approaching the curved bar area on the right side

notable_agents.action: bartender serving drinks behind the illuminated bar counter

entered.detail: curved bar with bright pink neon signage reading Moxie's and white illuminated counter
second level walkway with metal railings overlooking the main floor
large cylindrical red structural columns with cables attached
pink neon light strips embedded in the floor providing ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The space opens dramatically into a large multi-level nightclub with Moxie's bar prominently visible on the right, glowing with pink neon. The camera approaches the bar area while revealing upper balconies, industrial red pillars, and neon floor lighting throughout the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main club floor with seating booths and upper level walkways

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at ceiling structure and blue fluorescent skylights

agents.ego_description: walking through the club floor observing seated patrons and looking up at the upper levels

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket sitting on illuminated pink bench looking at phone

entered.detail: long blue fluorescent light strips arranged in geometric patterns on the high ceiling
curved bench seating with pink neon underlighting where patrons are seated
transparent glass barriers with pink neon edges on the upper level walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the club, passing seating booths with neon underlighting where patrons relax. The view tilts upward to reveal blue fluorescent ceiling strips and upper walkways with glass railings, while the industrial pillars move to the background as the player explores the main floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, dark alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched interior of a multi-level nightclub. It begins by walking through a narrow passage past a cyan-lit Speed Loan storefront and a figure in a neon pink vest, before turning into a long industrial corridor bathed in intense pink light from vertical wall strips. As the camera moves past exposed overhead pipes and waiting NPCs, the enclosed space opens dramatically into the vast main floor of Moxie's, where pink neon bars and red industrial pillars define the architecture. The scene then expands further as the camera glides past glowing seating booths, finally tilting upward to reveal blue fluorescent ceiling strips and glass-railed balconies overlooking the vibrant crowd.
